_comment: Archives unpacked by `python tools/hf_download.py unpack` after Hub download.

archives.note: Full MPP + MoleculeACE downstream trees (CSV + default 224 PNG). Depiction ablation subdirs are generated locally.
Graph pretraining metadata (mds.csv, train/test lists). Image PNGs are generated locally via tools/datasets/render_pretrain_images.py — not shipped on Hub.
